scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,code,desktop -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:core" "npm run dev:code" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:core: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet run --project src/Tinadec.AgentCore/Tinadec.AgentCore.csproj --urls http://127.0.0.1:48731"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet build TinadecCode.slnx --no-restore"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet test TinadecCode.slnx --no-build"
scripts.restore:dotnet: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:Ice-Version -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; dotnet restore TinadecCode.slnx"
